creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: Hello.  I can't replicate this on a 10.1-RELEASE-p14 Poudriere.  Note that the fix action for bug 200755 for print/cups-image you mentioned is actually a commit to print/cups-base as cups-image is as slave port cups-base.  If you are still able to replicate this then more information on how would be helpful else please close it if all the issues are resolved.
